nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: Single-user configuration with tenant and environment variables for Helix integration

nodes.name: TENANT_ID
nodes.summary: Tenant identifier from environment or default 'unimind'

nodes.name: USER_ID
nodes.summary: User identifier from environment or default 'default'

nodes.name: HELIX_URL
nodes.summary: Helix database server URL from environment or localhost:6969

nodes.name: EMBED_MODEL
nodes.summary: Fixed OpenAI embedding model: text-embedding-3-small

nodes.name: EMBED_DIM
nodes.summary: Vector dimension for embeddings: 1536

nodes.name: bootstrap.ts
nodes.summary: Idempotent index bootstrap for Helix - creates all schema indexes on startup

nodes.name: bootstrapIndexes
nodes.summary: Creates all Helix indexes for Entity, Memory, Category, and Session nodes

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that bootstraps indexes and logs results

nodes.name: client.ts
nodes.summary: Shared Helix client and write retry logic with exponential backoff

nodes.name: helix
nodes.summary: Singleton Helix database client instance

nodes.name: writeWithRetry
nodes.summary: Retries write requests on HTTP 409 conflicts with exponential backoff up to 4 attempts

nodes.name: entities.ts
nodes.summary: Entity data-access layer - candidate fetch via vector+BM25 search, entity creation and alias linking

nodes.name: EntityCandidate
nodes.summary: Union of vector+BM25 candidate entity with similarity scores

nodes.name: searchEntityCandidates
nodes.summary: Block step: union of vector and BM25 candidates for entity linking

nodes.name: createEntity
nodes.summary: Creates a fresh canonical entity node with embedding and aliases

nodes.name: addAliases
nodes.summary: Links new surface forms to existing entity by merging aliases

nodes.name: memories.ts
nodes.summary: Memory node write operations: persist, supersede, extend, goal status updates, reinforcement

nodes.name: PersistInput
nodes.summary: Input shape for persisting a new memory with type, embedding, mentions, and optional relations

nodes.name: persistMemory
nodes.summary: Creates Memory node + MENTIONS edges with decay policy and optional REL edges for relations

nodes.name: supersede
nodes.summary: Replaces old memory with new via UPDATES edge, supports bitemporal validity and hard-delete

nodes.name: linkExtends
nodes.summary: Enriches existing memory with new via EXTENDS edge without replacement

nodes.name: setGoalStatus
nodes.summary: Transitions GOAL memory lifecycle state (active → completed/abandoned)

nodes.name: bumpMemories
nodes.summary: Reinforces used memories by incrementing weight, accessCount, and lastAccessedAt

nodes.name: decayFor
nodes.summary: Returns decay policy and contextual TTL per memory primaryType

nodes.name: schema.ts
nodes.summary: Schema reference for memory graph - labels, edges, types, property shapes

nodes.name: L
nodes.summary: Node labels: Entity, Memory, Category, Session

nodes.name: E
nodes.summary: Edge labels: MENTIONS, REL, UPDATES, EXTENDS, DERIVES, IN_CATEGORY, DERIVED_FROM

nodes.name: PrimaryType
nodes.summary: Memory classification: EPISODIC, SEMANTIC, PROCEDURAL, CONTEXTUAL, GOAL

nodes.name: EntityType
nodes.summary: Entity classification: person, org, project, concept

nodes.name: EntityNode
nodes.summary: Canonical entity with key, name, type, aliases, embedding, confidence

nodes.name: MemoryNode
nodes.summary: Memory with type, content, embedding, weight, lifecycle fields (validFrom/To), decay policy

nodes.name: normalizeKey
nodes.summary: Normalizes tenant:name into unique entity keys with lowercase and space normalization

nodes.name: smoke.ts
nodes.summary: Schema smoke test - writes entities+memories with edges, exercises all read modalities

nodes.name: cleanup
nodes.summary: Removes test entities and memories by ID

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: E2E smoke test: write entities/memories, test vector/BM25/graph reads

nodes.name: drive.ts
nodes.summary: Live integration driver - pushes turns through ingest queue, forces flush, verifies Helix writes

nodes.name: memCount
nodes.summary: Queries Helix for memory count and sample content

nodes.name: wipe
nodes.summary: Clears all entities and memories for a tenant

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: E2E driver: enqueues turns, polls for writes, verifies pipeline end-to-end

nodes.name: drive_sync.ts
nodes.summary: Synchronous live verification via iii triggers on single connection

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Synchronous e2e: registers worker, triggers ingest directly, verifies round-trip

nodes.name: erRepair.ts
nodes.summary: Entity-resolution repair job - detects duplicate entities by embedding+alias similarity, merges them

nodes.name: DuplicatePair
nodes.summary: Pair of entities identified as duplicates with survivor, loser, and similarity

nodes.name: allEntities
nodes.summary: Fetches all entities for a tenant with name, type, aliases

nodes.name: detectDuplicates
nodes.summary: Finds duplicate entities by shared alias or high embedding similarity (≥0.95)

nodes.name: mergeEntities
nodes.summary: Merges duplicate entities: unions aliases, re-points MENTIONS edges, drops loser

nodes.name: erRepairSweep
nodes.summary: Runs duplicate detection and merges all found pairs

nodes.name: sweeps.ts
nodes.summary: Background maintenance sweeps - decay, forget, expire contextual memories per lifecycle

nodes.name: decaySweep
nodes.summary: Decays weight of idle memories (not accessed for 7+ days) by 0.9 factor

nodes.name: forgetSweep
nodes.summary: Soft-deletes weak/stale non-procedural/goal memories (weight<0.25, idle 45+ days)

nodes.name: expireContextual
nodes.summary: Physically drops CONTEXTUAL memories whose TTL has passed

nodes.name: worker.ts
nodes.summary: iii worker orchestration backbone for write path - registers queue functions, cron jobs, audit infrastructure

nodes.name: main body
nodes.summary: Worker entry point: initializes audit system, registers ingest/flush/sweep/maintenance functions

nodes.name: e2e.ts
nodes.summary: Read-path e2e test - seeds memories via write pipeline, runs read path with prompt, validates header injection

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: E2E read test: ingests turns, flushes, reads with prompt, validates injected header

nodes.name: buffer.ts
nodes.summary: Session-window buffer + flush-trigger logic - tracks buffered turns, decides when to flush

nodes.name: FlushConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for flush triggers: maxTurns, timeCapMs

nodes.name: DEFAULT_FLUSH
nodes.summary: Default flush config: 8 turns, 15 minute time cap

nodes.name: flushReason
nodes.summary: Pure function determining if buffer should flush (topic_shift, boundary, size, time_cap)

nodes.name: BufferStore
nodes.summary: Abstract store for session buffers with get/append/clear/list operations

nodes.name: FileBufferStore
nodes.summary: File-backed buffer store using JSON files, durable across hook processes

nodes.name: MemoryBufferStore
nodes.summary: In-memory buffer store for tests

nodes.name: e2e.ts
nodes.summary: Write-path e2e test - feeds prompts through ingest, forces flush, verifies Helix persistence

nodes.name: dumpTenant
nodes.summary: Queries all memories and entities for inspection

nodes.name: wipeTenant
nodes.summary: Clears all entities and memories for the test tenant

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: E2E write test: runs ingest pipeline, dumps extracted memories/entities for validation

nodes.name: extract.ts
nodes.summary: Extraction worker - calls LLM to extract durable memories from buffered session window

nodes.name: SYSTEM
nodes.summary: System prompt for memory extraction LLM - defines memory types, extraction rules

nodes.name: renderWindow
nodes.summary: Renders buffered session window into prompt text with project and turn context

nodes.name: ingest.ts
nodes.summary: Ingest handler - salience gate, buffer, flush-trigger check for write path

nodes.name: IngestResult
nodes.summary: Result of ingesting a turn: buffered flag, signals, optional flush summary

nodes.name: ingestTurn
nodes.summary: Main ingest function: runs salience gate, appends to buffer, checks flush triggers

nodes.name: pipeline.ts
nodes.summary: Flush orchestration - extract → embed → entity resolve → conflict resolve → persist → clear

nodes.name: FlushSummary
nodes.summary: Result of flushing: sessionId, reason, counts of written/reinforced/superseded/created/linked

nodes.name: flushSession
nodes.summary: Orchestrates full flush: extract → embed → entity-resolve → conflict → persist → clear buffer

nodes.name: remember.ts
nodes.summary: On-demand memory write - runs explicit statement through same pipeline as background capture

nodes.name: remember
nodes.summary: User-facing skill to explicitly remember a statement via the full write pipeline

nodes.name: salience.ts
nodes.summary: Per-turn salience gate - cheap heuristic (no LLM) to pre-filter turns for buffering

nodes.name: SalienceVerdict
nodes.summary: Gate verdict: pass flag, score 0..1, list of signals

nodes.name: COMMIT
nodes.summary: Regex pattern for commitment signals

nodes.name: PREFERENCE
nodes.summary: Regex pattern for preference signals

nodes.name: GOAL
nodes.summary: Regex pattern for goal/deadline signals

nodes.name: ASSERTION
nodes.summary: Regex pattern for assertion signals

nodes.name: NEGATIVE_FILLER
nodes.summary: Regex pattern for trivial acknowledgements to drop

nodes.name: NAMED
nodes.summary: Regex pattern for named entities (file paths, CamelCase, ALLCAPS, etc)

nodes.name: salienceGate
nodes.summary: Evaluates turn for buffering: checks commitment/preference/goal/assertion signals, named entities

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Write-path data shapes - TurnEvent, BufferedTurn, SessionBuffer, CandidateMemory, ExtractionResult

nodes.name: TurnEvent
nodes.summary: Captured event: sessionId, role, text, timestamp, project, optional toolName, boundary, topicShifted

nodes.name: BufferedTurn
nodes.summary: Buffered turn: role, text, ts, toolName, signals list

nodes.name: SessionBuffer
nodes.summary: Session buffer: sessionId, project, turns array, openedAt, lastTurnAt

nodes.name: CandidateMemory
nodes.summary: Extracted memory: content, primaryType, tags, confidence, salience, mentionRefs, optional relation

nodes.name: MentionCluster
nodes.summary: Coreference-resolved entity mention cluster: canonicalName, entityType, surfaceForms

nodes.name: ExtractionResult
nodes.summary: Extraction output: memories array, clusters array

nodes.name: FlushReason
nodes.summary: Flush trigger type: size, boundary, topic_shift, time_cap

nodes.name: retrieve.ts
nodes.summary: Read-path Helix queries - type-specific recall with vector/BM25/direct lookups, relational facts

nodes.name: RecallRow
nodes.summary: Retrieved memory with id, content, type, weight, dates, optional distance metric

nodes.name: MEM_PROJ
nodes.summary: Standard memory projections for queries without distance

nodes.name: MEM_PROJ_DIST
nodes.summary: Memory projections for search queries with distance metric

nodes.name: current
nodes.summary: Predicate for live/current memories: isLatest && !deleted && !superseded && userId match

nodes.name: liveCurrent
nodes.summary: App-side filtering for current memories from search results (in-query where drops distance)

nodes.name: notExpired
nodes.summary: Filters out contextual TTL-expired memories

nodes.name: recall
nodes.summary: Parallel retrieval: vector search, BM25, procedural, plus goals and contextual separately

nodes.name: similarMemories
nodes.summary: Vector search for similar memories by embedding

nodes.name: relationalFacts
nodes.summary: Fetches REL edges (relationships) between validated entities

nodes.name: validateEntities
nodes.summary: Validates entity existence and returns with canonical names

nodes.name: embed.ts
nodes.summary: Embedding client - wraps OpenAI text-embedding-3-small for fixed model+dimension

nodes.name: embed
nodes.summary: Embeds multiple texts with OpenAI embedding model, validates output dimension

nodes.name: embedOne
nodes.summary: Embeds a single text, convenience wrapper

nodes.name: loadEnv
nodes.summary: Loads OPENAI_API_KEY from .env if not set

nodes.name: server.ts
nodes.summary: MCP server exposing read/write paths as tools

nodes.name: main body
nodes.summary: Initializes MCP server with read/write tool handlers

nodes.name: header.ts
nodes.summary: Header builder - composes injected context from goals, contextual, relations, ranked memories

nodes.name: buildHeader
nodes.summary: Composes additionalContext text from multiple memory types within token budget

nodes.name: rank.ts
nodes.summary: Deterministic ranking - combines similarity, recency decay, weight, type priority, cuts to budget

nodes.name: TYPE_PRIORITY
nodes.summary: Per-type ranking priority weights (GOAL/CONTEXTUAL 1.0, PROCEDURAL 0.9, etc)

nodes.name: HALF_LIFE_DAYS
nodes.summary: Recency decay half-life: 30 days

nodes.name: RankedMemory
nodes.summary: RecallRow with computed score

nodes.name: recencyDecay
nodes.summary: Computes exponential decay factor based on last access age

nodes.name: scoreRow
nodes.summary: Scores a memory: sim × recency × weight × priority

nodes.name: rankMemories
nodes.summary: Deduplicates and ranks memories across recall lists by composite score, cuts to token budget

nodes.name: readPath.ts
nodes.summary: Read-path orchestrator - plan → embed → validate entities → parallel recall → rank → header → reinforce

nodes.name: ReadResult
nodes.summary: Read result: injected header, topicShifted flag, used memory IDs, debug info

nodes.name: readPath
nodes.summary: Main read orchestrator: plan query → embed → recall → rank → build header → bump used memories

nodes.name: recall.ts
nodes.summary: High-level recall wrapper - fetches and ranks memories in parallel

nodes.name: recall
nodes.summary: Parallel recall execution with vector, BM25, and direct retrievals

nodes.name: complete.ts
nodes.summary: Structured JSON completion wrapper - reusable vehicle for gray-zone LLM calls

nodes.name: HOT_MODEL
nodes.summary: Fast model for gray-zone adjudication: gpt-4o-mini by default

nodes.name: loadEnv
nodes.summary: Loads OPENAI_API_KEY from .env if not set

nodes.name: jsonComplete
nodes.summary: Calls LLM with json_object mode, returns parsed JSON - used for entity-link, conflict, planning

nodes.name: engine.ts
nodes.summary: Reusable matching engine - block → score → threshold → adjudicate (LLM on gray band only)

nodes.name: Scored
nodes.summary: Candidate with computed similarity score 0..1

nodes.name: Band
nodes.summary: Scoring band: match, gray, no_match

nodes.name: MatchOutcome
nodes.summary: Match result: band, sorted candidates, top, optional adjudication, usedLLM flag

nodes.name: MatchConfig
nodes.summary: Match config: block/score functions, high/low thresholds, grayLimit, adjudicate function

nodes.name: match
nodes.summary: Core matching: cheap block+score, threshold decision, LLM adjudicate only on gray band

nodes.name: scorers.ts
nodes.summary: Deterministic scoring primitives - cosine, trigram, alias similarity, weighted combine

nodes.name: cosineSim
nodes.summary: Cosine similarity of equal-length vectors mapped to [0,1]

nodes.name: distanceToSim
nodes.summary: Converts Helix vector distance (smaller=closer) to [0,1] similarity

nodes.name: normalize
nodes.summary: Normalizes string: trim, lowercase, remove non-alphanumeric

nodes.name: trigrams
nodes.summary: Extracts 3-character trigrams from normalized string

nodes.name: trigramSim
nodes.summary: Trigram Jaccard similarity [0,1] - robust to minor surface variation

nodes.name: bestAliasSim
nodes.summary: Best string similarity of query against any surface form (exact token match = 0.92+)

nodes.name: combine
nodes.summary: Weighted blend of named sub-scores, normalized by total weight

nodes.name: planner.ts
nodes.summary: Query planner - LLM call to decompose prompt into topics and entity refs, detects topic shift

nodes.name: planQuery
nodes.summary: Calls LLM to plan query: decompose into topics, extract entity names, detect topic shift

nodes.name: conflict.ts
nodes.summary: Conflict resolution - uses matching engine to decide between extracted memory and existing

nodes.name: resolveConflict
nodes.summary: Dispatches conflict: reinforce existing, supersede with correction, or add as new

nodes.name: entityResolve.ts
nodes.summary: Entity resolution - uses matching engine to link mentions to canonical entities or create new

nodes.name: resolveEntity
nodes.summary: Matches mention cluster to entity: searches candidates, scores deterministically, LLM on gray

nodes.name: engine.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for matching engine - verifies block/score/band/adjudication logic

nodes.name: drift-gate
nodes.summary: Experimental module for testing memory drift detection and classification

nodes.name: classify.ts
nodes.summary: Classification logic for drift gate detection using OpenAI API

nodes.name: eval.ts
nodes.summary: Evaluation framework for drift gate performance metrics and analysis

nodes.name: label.ts
nodes.summary: Labeling utilities for preparing training data for drift classification

nodes.name: openai.ts
nodes.summary: OpenAI API wrapper for drift gate classification and evaluation

nodes.name: Drift Gate
nodes.summary: Detection mechanism to identify when memory context has semantically drifted and should be refreshed

nodes.name: Classification Engine
nodes.summary: ML pipeline for classifying memory drift using LLM-based evaluation

nodes.name: hooks
nodes.summary: Lifecycle hooks for capturing, emitting, injecting, and silencing events in the memory pipeline

nodes.name: capture.ts
nodes.summary: Hook for capturing turn events and memory state changes during pipeline execution

nodes.name: emit.ts
nodes.summary: Hook for emitting turn events to external systems and integrations

nodes.name: inject.ts
nodes.summary: Hook for injecting context and state into the read path during query execution

nodes.name: silence.ts
nodes.summary: Hook for suppressing stdout output during sensitive operations

nodes.name: emitTurnEvent
nodes.summary: Emits a turn event to registered handlers and external systems

nodes.name: writeStdout
nodes.summary: Writes to stdout, respecting silence state

nodes.name: Hook System
nodes.summary: Extensible lifecycle hook system for memory pipeline events (capture, emit, inject, silence)

nodes.name: Event Flow
nodes.summary: Bidirectional event flow between memory system and external integrations

nodes.summary: Docker build context exclusion patterns for container image optimization

nodes.summary: Documentation for working with HelixDB agents and the Helix query DSL

nodes.summary: TypeScript and Docker build configurations for development and deployment

nodes.summary: S3-compatible object storage backend for HelixDB persistence

nodes.summary: Vector/graph/BM25 memory database backing the memory system

nodes.summary: Write pipeline and maintenance cron executor connecting to Helix and iii

nodes.summary: Patterns for excluding files/directories from codebase analysis

nodes.summary: Dockerfile for building UniMind worker container with Node.js and entrypoint

nodes.summary: Research findings and results from the drift-gate classification experiments

nodes.summary: Data extraction utilities for preparing experimental datasets from memory traces

nodes.summary: Example configurations and query patterns for using the memory system

nodes.summary: Docker-based deployment configuration for UniMind worker with health checks and bootstrap
